#  Invoice Administrator Guide 
Table of Contents 
##  What is Pay? 
Pay builds on the existing Project Financials and Invoice Management tools in Procore to streamline the subcontractor invoice payment process and automate the lien waiver exchange.
![How Procore Pay Builds On The Procore Platform](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/b8d910ec8c5f87068123d94639f2673a/35a5a0cb06fca23a871710297033b5ed/how-procore-pay-builds-on-the-procore-platform.png?fm=webp)

title: Invoice Administrator Guide - What is Pay?
description: This guide shows users with invoice administrators how to manage Procore Pay features with the Invoice Management tools in Procore. | What is Pay?
